title: The Supreme Court (Enlargement of Criminal Appellate Jurisdiction) Act, 1970
full_text: The Supreme Court (Enlargement of Criminal Appellate Jurisdiction) Act, 1970 उच्‍चतम न्‍यायालय (दाण्‍डिक अपीली अधिकारिता विस्‍तारण) अधिनियम, 1970 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 1970-28 Act Number: 28 Enactment Date: 1970-08-09 Act Year: 1970 Short Title: The Supreme Court (Enlargement of Criminal Appellate Jurisdiction) Act, 1970 Hindi Title: उच्‍चतम न्‍यायालय (दाण्‍डिक अपीली अधिकारिता विस्‍तारण) अधिनियम, 1970 Long Title: An Act to enlarge the appellate jurisdiction of the Supreme Court in regard to criminal matters.
